research_group.name: Núcleo de Estudos em Robótica e Automação

metadata.weight_definition: Each edge weight equals the total number of relationship evidences between two people. Every shared initiative, shared research group, and advisorship adds 1 to the edge weight.

relation_types.initiative: People who appear together in the same initiative team.
relation_types.research_group: People who belong to the same research group.
relation_types.advisorship: Supervisor and student connected by an advisorship.
